name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----

EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, Integers

CONSTANTS NumPHILOS
VARIABLES 
    philState ,     \\ State per philosopher: {Thinking,Hungry,Eating}, forkOwner, neighbor
    forkOwner      \\ Owner per fork: -1 means free, otherwise index of owning philosopher

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
\* Define constants for readability
THINKING == 0
HUNGRY   == 1
EATING   == 2

LEFT(i)  == IF i = 0 THEN NumPHILOS-1 ELSE i-1          (* left neighbor's fork index *)
RIGHT(i) == (i + 1) % NumPHILOS                        (* right neighbor's fork index *)

vars == <<philState,forkOwner>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
TypeOK ==
    \A p \in 0..NumPHILOS-1 :
        philState[p] \in { THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING } /\
    \A f \in 0..NumPHILOS-1 : forkOwner[f] \in (-1 .. NumPHILOS-1)

Init ==
    /\ philState' = [p \in 0..NumPHILOS-1 |-> THINKING]
    /\ forkOwner' = [f \in 0..NumPHILOS-1 |-> -1]

Next ==
    \/ (\A p \in 0..NumPHILOS-1:
            /* Philosopher starts thinking */
           (philState[p]=THINKING)
         -> 
             /\ philState'[p] = THINKING
             /\ UNCHANGED <<forkOwner>> )

    \/ (\A p \in 0..NumPHILOS-1:
            /* Philosopher becomes hungry and tries to pick up forks if both are free */
          (philState[p]=HUNGRY)
       /\ forkOwner[LEFT(p)]=-1
       /\ forkOwner[RIGHT(p)]=-1
      ->
              /\ philState'[p]   = EATING
              /\ forkOwner'[ LEFT(p)]   = p
              /\ forkOwner'[ RIGHT(p)]  = p
              /\ UNCHANGED <<(FORALL q != p: philState[q])>>
        )

    \/ (\A p \in 0..NumPHILOS-1:
            /* Philosopher finishes eating, puts down forks */
          (philState[p]=EATING)
     ->
               /\ philState'[p]   = THINKING
               /\ forkOwner' [LEFT(p)]   = -1
               /\ forkOwner' [RIGHT(p)]  = -1
               /\ UNCHANGED <<(FORALL q != p : philState[q])>>

           ) 

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
Spec == Init /\ []Next

====
